fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: New York CNA Certification Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your Certification (2026)
seo.description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to New York - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: CNA license reciprocity new york, how to transfer CNA license to new york, new york CNA endorsement application

board.name: New York State Dept of Health

license_types.title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a nursing assistant in New York.

steps.title: Complete Training Program
steps.description: Complete a state-approved CNA training program (typically 75-120 hours).

steps.title: Pass the State Competency Exam
steps.description: Pass both the written and clinical skills portions of your state's nurse aide competency exam. There is no national certification exam for CNAs.

steps.title: Submit Application and Fees
steps.description: Complete the state application, undergo a background check if required, and submit the necessary fees.

documents.detail: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.
Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

provisional_text: Some states allow CNAs to work under supervision for a limited period while their endorsement application is being processed.
reciprocity_text: CNAs certified in another state can often apply via endorsement (reciprocity) by providing registry verification from their home state.

faqs.question: Who administers the New York CNA exam?
faqs.answer: The NYS Nurse Aide exam is administered by Prometric. Register at prometric.com/nurseaide/ny.

faqs.question: How do I verify a New York CNA?
faqs.answer: Use the Prometric NY Nurse Aide Registry portal or call the 24/7 IVR line at 1-800-918-8818.

faqs.question: How do I transfer my CNA to New York?
faqs.answer: Contact Prometric at the NY Nurse Aide Portal to apply for reciprocity.

faqs.question: How long does New York CNA endorsement take?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. Contact the registry for current timelines.

reciprocity.notes: Contact Prometric at the NY Nurse Aide portal to apply for reciprocity. Phone verification available 24/7 at 1-800-918-8818.

variants.label: New Applicant
variants.description: How to become a CNA in NY.

variants.label: Reciprocity
variants.description: Transfer an active out-of-state CNA to New York.

hero.title: Become a CNA in New York
hero.dek: New York CNA certification requires a 120-hour training program, New York State Dept of Health eligibility, and a passing score on the NNAAP (Prometric) exam.

seo.title: How to Become a CNA in New York
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to New York CNA certification.
